---
description: Produces an Architectural Decision Record (ADR) for a feature by synthesising the
  full consensus history — key decisions, rationale, and rejected alternatives
model: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (GitHub Copilot)
tools: ['read', 'edit', 'search/codebase', 'agent']
user-invocable: false
---

Produces an Architectural Decision Record (ADR) for a feature by synthesising the full consensus
history — key decisions, rationale, and rejected alternatives.
